name: CHUTE Market Intelligence Orchestrator
objective: Turn TxLINE live data and TxOdds priors into safe quiz composition decisions and child-skill requirements.
description: Coordinates fixture intelligence, proof coverage and quiz composition for CHUTE.

required_mcps.name: txline_adapter
required_mcps.purpose: Read live fixtures, snapshots, proof refs and validation availability.

required_mcps.name: txodds_history_store
required_mcps.purpose: Read historical priors and editorial signals used by predictive tiers.

human_approval_required_for: opening a new tier in production
publishing a new market family as proof-capable
confidence_rules: >=0.9 only when live fixture identity, proof coverage and historical priors are all evidenced.
<=0.4 when proof coverage is partial or fixture identity is unresolved.
0 when TxLINE access or proof evidence is missing.

failure_modes.behavior: Return blocked output and list missing child skills or evidence.
Do not open or market the affected tier.

recommended_actions: Use TxOdds to shape priors and TxLINE to authorize proof-capable publication.
Create missing child skills before expanding market families.
Treat creator-led quiz minting as a separate risk and economics lane.
blocked_actions: Do not infer proof coverage from editorial data alone.
Do not publish new tiers from replay evidence as if they were live-proofed.
Do not claim Superteam readiness without evidence package and human review.
Do not expose creator monetization without wallet ownership, fee rules and proof-aware publishability.

recommended_actions: Mine TxLINE and TxOdds evidence before expanding tiers.
blocked_actions: Cannot publish a new proof-capable tier yet.
